market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
articles.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

articles.title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
articles.description: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

articles.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
articles.description: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
articles.description: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto ETFs
articles.description: Global crypto ETFs saw significant outflows in May, but diversified exposures showed relative resilience; we explore what the data signals for long-term investors.

articles.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
articles.description: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

articles.title: U.S. House bill would erect crypto-theft task force across law enforcement agencies
articles.description: New legislation from a bipartisan duo would set up a multi-agency group under the U.S. attorney general to take a lead on cryptocurrency theft cases.

articles.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
articles.description: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

articles.title: 紅光與暗塵交織的「視錯覺」，ESO 公布最新船尾座星雲壯麗影像
articles.description: 歐洲南方天文台（ESO）近日公布一張由甚大巡天望遠鏡（VLT Survey Telescope，簡稱 VST） […]

articles.title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
articles.description: SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd is betting the ocean has vast amounts of untapped geothermal energy.

articles.title: SpaceX stock is coming to Solana on the same day it lists on Nasdaq
articles.description: The firms making that possible say eligible shares can also be converted back into tokens, creating a bridge between traditional brokerage accounts and blockchain-based markets.

articles.title: Canton Network developer raises $355 million to bring Wall Street onchain
articles.description: The investment comes as blockchains designed for big banks and institutions are having a moment, with Stripe's Tempo and Circle's Arc raising hundreds of millions of dollars.

articles.title: Tether leads $1.4 billion funding round in German robotics company Neura
articles.description: The investment is part of the stablecoin giant’s expansion into industries outside of crypto.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 4.5% as all constituents rise
articles.description: Solana (SOL), up 2.6% from Wednesday, was also a top performer.

articles.title: Bitcoin tags $63.2K as BTC price action ignores inflation, Iran Hormuz closure
articles.description: Bitcoin mostly preserved a recent rebound despite the highest US PPI inflation since October 2022 and Iran closing the Strait of Hormuz oil route.

articles.title: Citi opens new route into private markets with tokenized share offering
articles.description: The bank said it is using blockchain technology to connect investors with private company equity through digital depositary receipts.

articles.title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
articles.description: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.

articles.title: Ondo Finance hires former Invesco ETF chief to build onchain investment products
articles.description: John Hoffman will spearhead Ondo's expansion from tokenizing individual assets to full investment portfolios and strategies.

articles.title: Hungary to reverse crypto trading crackdown after EU scrutiny
articles.description: Hungary’s government said it will unwind crypto trading restrictions that required approved validation for conversions and exposed users and service providers to criminal liability.
